calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Vacated

Petition For Revocation Of Trust; Recovery Of Esatte/Trust Property, Double Damages, Attorney'S Fees And Costs; Violation Of Probate Code Sec. 259 "E
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Continued To Jun-20-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stanley Pedder (via court call) for (petitioner) Anna D'Angelo. Benjamin Ballard for (respondent) Agnes Szanto.

The Court asked if there was a possibility of mediation. Mr. Pedder replied yes. Mr. Ballard replied yes, that they have talked about it, asked that if it does not succeed could they proceed with trial in department 204 for two afternoons or would it have to go to department 206 and confirmed that there would be more than 6 witnesses. The Court stated that it would set a mediation deadline and trial date. Mr. Ballard requested an expert disclosure deadline. The matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial on June 20,2016 and signed the order for the same, stated that the deadline for expert witness disclosure is May 2, 2016 and that the deadline for mediation is May 16, 2016. The parties are to inform the court as to the outcome of mediation.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos & Deputy Neves. (Not Reported)
